ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "participant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "participant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "participant_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the assessment */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., motor, attentional, non-planning) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the task (e.g., normal, red) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was completed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the assessment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the assessment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motor_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motor task */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the task belongs to */,
  "motor_condition" TEXT /* Motor condition (e.g., stop) */,
  "motor_normal" REAL /* Motor normal score */,
  "motor_red" REAL /* Motor red score */,
  "bis_score" INTEGER /* BIS score */,
  "bis_type" TEXT /* BIS type (e.g., low, high) */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the motor task */,
  "task_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the motor task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motor task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motor task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motor_tasks_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attentional_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attentional task */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the task belongs to */,
  "attentional_score" INTEGER /* Attentional score */,
  "attentional_type" TEXT /* Attentional type (e.g., low, high) */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the attentional task */,
  "task_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the attentional task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attentional task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attentional task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attentional_tasks_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonplanning_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-planning task */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the task belongs to */,
  "nonplanning_score" INTEGER /* Non-planning score */,
  "nonplanning_type" TEXT /* Non-planning type (e.g., low, high) */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the non-planning task */,
  "task_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the non-planning task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the non-planning task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the non-planning task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonplanning_tasks_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gsr_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GSR data point */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the data belongs to */,
  "gsr_mean" REAL /* GSR mean */,
  "gsr_maximum" REAL /* GSR maximum */,
  "motor_task_normal_accuracy" REAL /* Motor task normal accuracy */,
  "motor_task_red_accuracy" REAL /* Motor task red accuracy */,
  "motor_task_rt" INTEGER /* Motor task reaction time */,
  "gsr_source" TEXT /* Source of the GSR data (e.g., device, sensor) */,
  "gsr_units" TEXT /* Units of the GSR data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GSR data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GSR data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gsr_data_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
